name: Mamatha Maben
profileSummary: Mamatha Maben is an Indian former cricketer who played as an all-rounder, batting right-handed and bowling right-arm medium. She appeared in four Test matches and 40 One Day Internationals for India between 1993 and 2004, including playing at the 1993 World Cup and captaining the side in 2003 and 2004. She played domestic cricket for Karnataka, Railways and Air India.
